sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103567" key="te/trafa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέτρᾰφα</orth>, <sense id="n103567.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρέπω</ref> </xr> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρέφω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
